title: Origin of 24 FAIL: demonstrates a wrong H²-G² value
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: fundamental (d,e)=(2,1) declares H_sq_minus_G_sq=25 instead of the correct H²-G²=49-25=24.
